title: JSON Decoding, DTOs, Domain Types, Unknown Fields, and Schema Drift · Language Lens: Pokedex Go Schema Fixtures
summary: The program decodes into map[string]any, asserts nested types, confuses absent with zero, trusts response identity, and breaks when harmless unknown fields appear. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go schema fixtures increment in typed PokéAPI DTO-to-domain admission boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory…

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
